title: Bagus Lib
description: This mod is using baguchi's mod and you can use too!
body:
# Bagus Lib


![Dialog Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/95nSN4Rd/images/f5bff189b354b83fc4ab3451ce16c5015edad806.png)

## Summary

This mod is using baguchi's mod and you can use too!

Bagus Lib Include Entity Util and camera util also usefull for developer!

 

 

## This build include this:

camera util

IArmor make allow the more extend customiztably for dev!

Custom Armor layer(IArmor need it and allow the armor render even non Humaroid Model!)

Also BuiltIn Camera Shake Support for Vanilla mob!(for 1.3~)

animation support melee ai

dialog util and dialog command(8.8.2~)

grobal entity animation(almost entity now can animate)

Developers who want to use Bagus Lib [You can Read The Wiki](https://github.com/baguchan/BagusLib/wiki).
